name: Lab Sheet Creator
description: Generate lecture-aligned LabSheets from the rendered construction file text produced by create_construction_file.

inputs.name: construction_file_txt
inputs.description: Rendered construction file text produced by create_construction_file.

inputs.name: thread_letter
inputs.description: Lecture-style thread letter used in labels such as A1, A2, A3. Default is 'A'.

inputs.name: include_text_render
inputs.description: Whether to include a lecture-style text rendering of the generated lab sheets.

outputs.description: A result object containing structured lab sheets, optional rendered text, and notes.

input.construction_file_txt:
PCR           insF          insR          insert1            insert1_pcr
PCR           vecF          vecR          pET28a             pET28a_pcr
GoldenGate    pET28a_pcr    insert1_pcr   BsaI               my_construct
Transform     my_construct  Mach1         Kan                37           my_construct_e

notes: Lab sheets were generated from rendered construction file text.
